_comment: Sunday Batch Orchestrator blueprints (PRD R7–R9): parallel-track timelines across stations. Seed = one short demo blueprint so M1 has data to render; real multi-recipe blueprints are authored content (out of build-loop scope).

tasks.text: Lime & marinate the chicken; chop tomato, onion, garlic, pepper, carrots.
Heat oil and brown the chicken in batches.
tasks.while_waiting: While each batch browns, mix the cornstarch into the coconut milk.

tasks.text: Return chicken, add marinade + carrots, cook 10 min.
Stir in the coconut-milk slurry; simmer until glossy and chicken reads 165°F.
Preheat the oven to 400°F and grease the muffin tin.
Brown 8 oz sausage for the egg bites (~6 min); drain and cool.
tasks.while_waiting: While the sausage browns, whisk the eggs + cream for the bites.

tasks.text: Roast the Cobb chicken breast 22–25 min until 165°F; rest and slice.
tasks.while_waiting: While the chicken roasts, fill the muffin cups with the egg mixture.

tasks.text: Stir sausage, spinach, and cheddar into the eggs; fill the muffin cups ¾ full.
Bake the egg bites 18–20 min until set; cool and lift out.
tasks.while_waiting: While they bake, hard-boil eggs and crisp the bacon for the Cobb jars.

tasks.text: Hard-boil eggs: boil, turn off heat, cover 12 min, then ice-bath and peel.
Assemble the Cobb jars: dressing, chicken, egg, bacon, blue cheese, tomatoes, romaine on top.
Whisk the chia pudding (chia + almond milk + vanilla + sweetener).
tasks.while_waiting: While the chia sets, start thawing the shrimp in cold water.

tasks.text: Thaw and dry 1 lb shrimp (cold-water soak 15 min, then pat very dry).
Whisk the chia again to break up clumps; divide into 5 jars and chill overnight.
Sauté the lunch shrimp ~2 min/side until pink and curled into a C; chill.
Pack the shrimp & avocado boxes (shrimp, romaine, tomatoes, dressing on the side, lime).
